perCaseResults.title: Screenshot-shaped repeated workflow duplicate needs narrative context

deterministicView.headline: A repeated workflow problem showed up across recent sessions.
deterministicView.whatHappened: The same failure pattern was observed twice in recent sessions.
deterministicView.whyItMatters: Repeating the same idea in Problem and What happened makes the focused card less useful.
deterministicView.expectedBehavior: Recurring workflow friction should be summarized without exposing raw evidence by default.
limits: Display-only diagnosis; stored delta fields were not changed.
No model call was made; this was generated locally from stored delta fields, detector signals, and evidence snippets.

outputView.headline: A repeated workflow problem showed up across recent sessions.
outputView.whatHappened: Pi saw the same failure pattern in two recent evidence summaries and grouped it as one recurring workflow issue. That recurrence is why the card treats the issue as a pattern rather than an isolated failure. The stored details are bounded and redacted, so the exact cause remains limited to the summarized evidence.
outputView.whyItMatters: Repeating the same idea in Problem and What happened makes the focused card less useful.
outputView.expectedBehavior: Recurring workflow friction should be summarized without exposing raw evidence by default.
limits: Display-only diagnosis; stored delta fields were not changed.
Optional local model phrasing was used for display-only wording; stored delta fields, routing, and artifacts were not changed.

perCaseResults.notes: Positive/equivalent corpus example should be accepted by the narrative validator.

perCaseResults.title: Validation recurrence narrative adds stale-shell sequence without raw command echo

deterministicView.headline: Repeated validation failure pattern in a stale project shell.
deterministicView.whatHappened: Two related validation attempts failed from the same stale-shell pattern.
deterministicView.whyItMatters: Repeated validation friction makes the result hard to trust.
deterministicView.expectedBehavior: Validation should run from a fresh project shell after changes.
limits: Display-only diagnosis; stored delta fields were not changed.
No model call was made; this was generated locally from stored delta fields, detector signals, and evidence snippets.

outputView.headline: Repeated validation failure pattern in a stale project shell.
outputView.whatHappened: Two related validation attempts ended in the same stale-shell pattern. The stored summaries point to repeated validation friction rather than a confirmed code defect. The only expected behavior recorded is to validate from a fresh project shell after changes.
outputView.whyItMatters: Repeated validation friction makes the result hard to trust.
outputView.expectedBehavior: Validation should run from a fresh project shell after changes.
limits: Display-only diagnosis; stored delta fields were not changed.
Optional local model phrasing was used for display-only wording; stored delta fields, routing, and artifacts were not changed.

perCaseResults.notes: Positive/equivalent corpus example should be accepted by the narrative validator.

perCaseResults.title: Build/typecheck loop narrative stays build-specific and avoids production claims

deterministicView.headline: Repeated build-check failure during local typecheck validation.
deterministicView.whatHappened: A local build check failed in a nearby validation loop.
deterministicView.whyItMatters: A release package would be hard to trust without a clean build.
deterministicView.expectedBehavior: Build validation should pass before release packaging.
limits: Display-only diagnosis; stored delta fields were not changed.
No model call was made; this was generated locally from stored delta fields, detector signals, and evidence snippets.

outputView.headline: Repeated build-check failure during local typecheck validation.
outputView.whatHappened: Local evidence shows the build check failed in a nearby typecheck validation loop. That recurrence makes the release package hard to trust until a clean build is observed. The facts only support a local build-validation issue, not a production incident.
outputView.whyItMatters: A release package would be hard to trust without a clean build.
outputView.expectedBehavior: Build validation should pass before release packaging.
limits: Display-only diagnosis; stored delta fields were not changed.
Optional local model phrasing was used for display-only wording; stored delta fields, routing, and artifacts were not changed.

perCaseResults.notes: Positive/equivalent corpus example should be accepted by the narrative validator.

perCaseResults.title: Stale exact-text edit narrative explains sequence without file-path leakage

deterministicView.headline: Repeated stale edit attempt: exact replacement text no longer matched the file.
deterministicView.whatHappened: The edit failed because the target text no longer matched.
deterministicView.whyItMatters: Repeated stale edits slow review and can hide the actual implementation issue.
deterministicView.rawClue: Read the current file before replacing exact text.
limits: Display-only diagnosis; stored delta fields were not changed.
No model call was made; this was generated locally from stored delta fields, detector signals, and evidence snippets.
Raw command, path, detector, or provenance details should stay secondary to this diagnosis.

outputView.headline: Repeated stale edit attempt: exact replacement text no longer matched the file.
outputView.whatHappened: An exact-text edit failed after the file contents changed, so the replacement target no longer matched. The same stale-edit pattern creates review churn because the assistant can keep editing against an old view of the file. The supported fix expectation is to read the current file before replacing text.
outputView.whyItMatters: Repeated stale edits slow review and can hide the actual implementation issue.
outputView.rawClue: Read the current file before replacing exact text.
limits: Display-only diagnosis; stored delta fields were not changed.
Raw command, path, detector, or provenance details should stay secondary to this diagnosis.
Optional local model phrasing was used for display-only wording; stored delta fields, routing, and artifacts were not changed.

perCaseResults.notes: Positive/equivalent corpus example should be accepted by the narrative validator.

perCaseResults.title: User correction narrative preserves correction without blaming unsupported system behavior

deterministicView.headline: The user had to correct an assistant assumption.
deterministicView.whatHappened: The user corrected an assistant assumption about the API argument shape.
deterministicView.whyItMatters: The user had to interrupt the assistant to correct an implementation assumption.
deterministicView.expectedBehavior: Use the API shape the user corrected, not the assistant prior assumption.
deterministicView.rawClue: User correction: the API accepts an options object rather than a string argument.
limits: Display-only diagnosis; stored delta fields were not changed.
No model call was made; this was generated locally from stored delta fields, detector signals, and evidence snippets.
Raw command, path, detector, or provenance details should stay secondary to this diagnosis.

outputView.headline: The user had to correct an assistant assumption.
outputView.whatHappened: During the session, the user corrected the assistant about the API argument shape. The stored facts say the assistant had treated an options object like a string argument, which interrupted progress. This is evidence of an assistant assumption correction, not evidence that the API itself was broken.
outputView.whyItMatters: The user had to interrupt the assistant to correct an implementation assumption.
outputView.expectedBehavior: Use the API shape the user corrected, not the assistant prior assumption.
outputView.rawClue: User correction: the API accepts an options object rather than a string argument.
limits: Display-only diagnosis; stored delta fields were not changed.
Raw command, path, detector, or provenance details should stay secondary to this diagnosis.
Optional local model phrasing was used for display-only wording; stored delta fields, routing, and artifacts were not changed.

perCaseResults.notes: Positive/equivalent corpus example should be accepted by the narrative validator.

perCaseResults.title: Manual ownership-boundary note may remain equivalent when already clear

deterministicView.headline: Assistant confused the storage mapper ownership boundary.
deterministicView.whatHappened: The assistant edited storage when mapper code owned the behavior.
deterministicView.whyItMatters: Review churn increased before implementation could continue.
deterministicView.expectedBehavior: Check the mapper before editing storage.
limits: Display-only diagnosis; stored delta fields were not changed.
No model call was made; this was generated locally from stored delta fields, detector signals, and evidence snippets.

outputView.headline: Assistant confused the storage mapper ownership boundary.
outputView.whatHappened: The assistant edited storage while the mapper owned the behavior boundary. The manual note already captures the ownership mismatch and the resulting review churn. A faithful narrative can stay close to that wording rather than expanding it.
outputView.whyItMatters: Review churn increased before implementation could continue.
outputView.expectedBehavior: Check the mapper before editing storage.
limits: Display-only diagnosis; stored delta fields were not changed.
Optional local model phrasing was used for display-only wording; stored delta fields, routing, and artifacts were not changed.

perCaseResults.notes: Positive/equivalent corpus example should be accepted by the narrative validator.
